app_description: A modern task management application with team collaboration, real-time updates, and analytics dashboard

features.title: Project Infrastructure Setup
features.description: Initialize the monorepo structure with Next.js frontend, Express backend, and PostgreSQL database. Set up ESLint, Prettier, TypeScript configs, and CI/CD basics.

features.title: User Authentication
features.description: Implement email/password registration and login with JWT tokens. Include password reset via email, session management, and protected routes.
acceptance_criteria: Users can register with email and password
Users can login and receive JWT token
Password reset flow works via email
Protected API routes reject unauthenticated requests

features.title: Task CRUD Operations
features.description: Core task management: create, read, update, delete tasks. Tasks have title, description, status (todo/in-progress/done), priority, due date, and assignee.
acceptance_criteria: Create task with all required fields
List tasks with pagination and filtering
Task validation enforced on both client and server

features.title: Project & Team Management
features.description: Organize tasks into projects. Support team creation, member invitation, and role-based permissions (owner, admin, member, viewer).
acceptance_criteria: Team member list with role display

sub_features.title: Project CRUD & Organization
sub_features.description: Create, read, update, delete projects. Associate tasks with projects.

sub_features.title: Team & Permissions
sub_features.description: Team creation, member invitation, role-based access control.

features.title: Real-time Updates
features.description: Add WebSocket-based real-time notifications for task changes, comments, and team activity. Show live updates without page refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Task status changes appear in real-time for team members
Connection status indicator shown in UI

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard showing task completion rates, team productivity metrics, overdue task tracking, and project progress visualization.
acceptance_criteria: Date range filtering for all charts
